Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: A chat session between the user and Lumina AI.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this conversation.

title.description: A brief summary or title of the chat session.

lastModifiedAt.description: When the last message was sent.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: An individual message within a conversation.

/conversations/{conversationId}/messages.description: The messages belonging to a specific conversation.
